column8: port td5_physics_compute_suspension_envelope mirrors orig: AABB loop, racer/traffic y_val_x branch, +-20 padding, FTOL truncation, sphere radius, 0x86 store, slot>=6 footprint
port td5_asset_load_environs_pages loads PNGs from re/assets/environs/ via stbi+td5_plat_render_upload_texture; orig DDraw blob-based zip/blob page upload replaced
port initialize_strip_metadata mirrors orig: case-insens 'sun' prefix check on 4 entries (offsets 0x40/0x60/0x80/0xA0) -> writes 3 or 1; defensive empty-name fallback matches orig _strnicmp behavior
port hardcodes current_attr=0 + signature; orig takes (track_idx, default_attr). Effect-equivalent on stock STRIP.DAT (index-0 override fires first); explicitly documented as port-side limitation
port td5_asset_load_level loads STRIP/LEFT/RIGHT/TRAFFIC/CHECKPT/LEVELINF via ZIP; orig uses M2DX HeapAllocTracked + per-track pointer tables. Functionally equivalent file-load + globals binding
